_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PANEL
name: Discord Music Bot
author: junerhobart@users.noreply.github.com
description: Ephemeral Discord music bot. discord.js v14 + discord-player v7, YouTube/Spotify/SoundCloud/Apple Music, poll-based vote skip/stop. All replies ephemeral.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

apt-get update -qq
apt-get install -y -qq git > /dev/null

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

GIT_BRANCH="${GIT_BRANCH:-main}"
REPO="github.com/junerhobart/discord-bot.git"

if [ -n "${GIT_TOKEN}" ]; then
    CLONE_URL="https://${GIT_TOKEN}@${REPO}"
else
    CLONE_URL="https://${REPO}"
fi

if [ -d .git ]; then
    git remote set-url origin "${CLONE_URL}"
    git fetch origin "${GIT_BRANCH}"
    git reset --hard "origin/${GIT_BRANCH}"
else
    git clone --depth 1 --branch "${GIT_BRANCH}" "${CLONE_URL}" .
fi

npm install -g pnpm
pnpm install
pnpm approve-builds --all 2>/dev/null || true

if [ ! -f node_modules/ffmpeg-static/ffmpeg ]; then
    echo "Rebuilding ffmpeg-static..."
    pnpm rebuild ffmpeg-static 2>/dev/null || true
fi

if [ -f node_modules/ffmpeg-static/ffmpeg ]; then
    echo "ffmpeg-static: OK"
else
    echo "WARNING: ffmpeg-static binary missing"
fi

echo "Install complete"

variables.name: Discord Bot Token
variables.description: Bot token from the Discord Developer Portal (Bot tab).

variables.name: Discord Client ID
variables.description: Application ID from the Discord Developer Portal.

variables.name: Discord Guild ID
variables.description: Server ID where slash commands are registered.

variables.name: GitHub Token
variables.description: Personal access token with repo read access. Required because the repository is private.
